data.title: TTEC Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:TTEC) updates on potential take-private transaction July 31, 2025, with the Board of Directors.
data.description: Austin, TX - On August 1, 2025, TTEC Holdings, Inc. revealed that the Board of Directors approved significant decisions on July 31, 2025. TTEC, a key player in CX technology and services worldwide, specializing in AI-driven solutions, operates under the NASDAQ symbol TTEC.

data.title: Former Louisiana AG investigates GoodRx; Law firm Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC probing officers & directors of GDRX.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, the legal firm Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (KSF) initiated an inquiry into GoodRx Holdings, Inc. (NasdaqGS: GDRX). The investigation is focused on determining if GoodRx's executives and/or board members violated their fiduciary responsibilities.

data.title: Investigation initiated by ex-Louisiana AG into officers/directors of Century Aluminum Co. (CENX). By Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, in New York and New Orleans, an investigation was initiated by law firm Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (KSF) regarding Century Aluminum Company (NasdaqGS: CENX). KSF is looking into potential breaches of fiduciary duties by officers and/or directors of Century.

data.title: Former Louisiana AG investigates Altice USA officers & directors. Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC looking into ATUS (NYSE) for breach of fiduciary duties.
data.description: A legal investigation has been initiated by the law firm Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (KSF) regarding Altice USA, Inc. (NYSE: ATUS) based in New York and New Orleans on August 1, 2025. The investigation is focused on determining if there have been breaches of fiduciary duties by Altice's officers and/or directors. Altice is under scrutiny as KSF delves into examining any potential misconduct.

data.title: Former Louisiana AG launches investigation into officers and directors of Capital One Financial Corporation. Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC conducting probe.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, Charles C. Foti, Jr., a former Attorney General of Louisiana and current partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, revealed an ongoing investigation by the firm into Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE: COF). This investigation signifies KSF's scrutiny into potential issues concerning the financial corporation.

data.title: Kodiak Gas Services (NYSE: KGS) joining S&P SmallCap 600, replacing NV5 Global (NASD: NVEE) on August 6.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, Kodiak Gas Services Inc. (NYSE: KGS) announced that it will replace NV5 Global Inc. (NASD: NVEE) in the S&P SmallCap 600 index starting on August 6. Acuren Corp. (NYSE: TIC) is set to acquire NV5 Global in a pending deal. The transition will occur before the market opens on the specified date.

data.title: Zettabyte, AI data center leader, gets investment from Lam Capital, along with Foxconn, Pegatron, and Wistron.
data.description: A major investment round has been joined by Lam Capital, along with tech giants Foxconn, Pegatron, and Wistron, as partners with Zettabyte, a prominent innovator in AI data center infrastructure software. The investment deal was announced today, August 1, 2025, in Taipei. Lam Capital, the corporate venture arm of Lam, is part of this new strategic investment venture. This move signals significant growth potential for Zettabyte, showcasing trust and support from key industry players.
Kodiak Gas Services Set to Join S&P SmallCap 600

data.title: Before Trump's trade deadline, companies quickly moved goods from duty-free warehouses to avoid tariffs and save on costs.
data.description: Importers were able to mitigate the tariff rate they paid by storing inventory in bonded warehouses or foreign trade zones. This strategy allowed them to safeguard against potentially higher tariffs, resulting in significant cost savings.
